series_title: มะลิทำความดี
episode_title: พี่สาวแสนดี กับภารกิจจมูกโล่ง

storyboard.image_prompt: Mali same face identity anchor, 35mm lens, warm morning light, Mali in her yellow floral dress is looking worried, standing near a crib. Background is a cluttered but cozy nursery. The baby inside is red-faced from congestion. No text.
storyboard.video_prompt: Visual: Mali as big sister, looking into a crib with a concerned expression. | Actions: 0-9s: She gently smooths the blanket, then touches the baby's hand, comforting it. | Flow: Slow-motion close-up. | Product Focus: Subtle. | Psychology: Sibling bond emotional hook. | Audio: (Mali speaks: 'โอ๋ๆ ไม่ร้องนะคนเก่ง พี่มะลิอยู่ตรงนี้แล้วค่ะ') + SFX: Quiet baby whimpering.

storyboard.image_prompt: Mali same face identity anchor, 50mm lens, medium shot, Mali standing with determination, looking at an old-fashioned bulb syringe on a counter, then shaking her head 'no'. The bottle of Aqua Maris is visible nearby. 8k.
storyboard.video_prompt: Visual: Mali evaluating and rejecting the old way. | Actions: 0-9s: Mali looks from the syringe to the baby, makes a decisive head shake, and reaches for the Aqua Maris bottle instead. | Flow: Smooth transition. | Product Focus: Syringe as old-school, product as new solution. | Psychology: Identifying pain points and providing modern solutions. | Audio: (Mali speaks: 'ใช้แบบเก่าทั้งยากทั้งเจ็บ พี่มะลิไม่เอาดีกว่า!') + SFX: Hard sound effect.

storyboard.image_prompt: Mali same face identity anchor, 50mm lens, high-speed photography, Mali carefully using the Aqua Maris Baby spray in one of the baby's nostrils. The baby is calm and curious. Natural window light.
storyboard.video_prompt: Visual: Gentle and easy application. | Actions: 0-9s: Mali uses the spray with one hand, demonstrating how simple it is. The baby is calm, showing no fear or discomfort. | Flow: Steady, rhythmic. | Product Focus: Ease of use by an 'older sibling.' | Psychology: Demonstrating safety and effectiveness. | Audio: (Mali speaks: 'แค่นิดเดียวเอง... จมูกก็โล่งแล้ว!') + SFX: Soft water spray.

storyboard.image_prompt: Mali same face identity anchor, 35mm lens, wide angle, bright daylight, baby is smiling and happy, playing with a small toy. Mali is sitting beside the crib, looking relieved and happy. Natural, warm lighting.
storyboard.video_prompt: Visual: Relief and happiness post-use. | Actions: 0-9s: The camera pulls back to show the happy baby and a relaxed Mali, holding the spray bottle playfully. | Flow: Quick, joyful cuts. | Product Focus: Completed result. | Psychology: Reward/Satisfaction. | Audio: (Mali speaks: 'เห็นไหม หายใจโล่งก็ยิ้มได้แล้ว เก่งที่สุดเลย!') + SFX: Baby giggle.

storyboard.image_prompt: Mali same face identity anchor, 50mm lens, studio portrait, Mali holding the Aqua Maris Baby bottle close to her face, smiling broadly and giving a thumbs up. Professional lighting with soft box. 8k.
storyboard.video_prompt: Visual: Direct recommendation call to action. | Actions: 0-9s: Mali smiles at the camera, points to the product and then to the link below. The light highlights the bottle clearly. | Flow: High-energy cut. | Product Focus: Direct sale. | Psychology: Trustworthy recommendation. | Audio: (Mali speaks: 'ดูแลน้องง่ายๆ หายใจโล่งทั้งวัน กดสั่งที่ลิงก์ด้านล่างเลยนะคะ!') + SFX: Pop sound.
